input.memoryNote: You have watched The Office from start to finish eleven times and you still laugh at the exact same jokes every single time, loudly, with full body engagement. Your joy is completely unhinged. I find it deeply endearing. I also find it insane.

meta.tiktokHook: My husband has watched The Office 11 times. Same jokes. Same loud laugh. Every time. His joy is unhinged and I married him knowing this. Happy birthday to him.
